commands.name: Ruff lint
commands.fix: Run `uv run ruff check --fix src tests`, or fix the reported lines.

commands.name: Pytest
commands.fix: Run `uv run pytest -q` and fix the failing test.

commands.name: Audit pinned dependencies

args: uv export --no-hashes --format requirements-txt | uv run --with pip-audit pip-audit -r /dev/stdin --ignore-vuln PYSEC-2025-183

commands.fix: Review the advisory; bump the dependency in pyproject.toml + uv.lock, or add a justified --ignore-vuln (see pip-audit.yml for the rationale on PYSEC-2025-183).
